common.testimonies: Testimonies of lives touched by our ministry
common.donation_description: Your generous donations help us continue spreading God's love through music, supporting our choir members, and reaching communities with the message of hope and grace.

home.title: Welcome to Neema Gospel Choir
home.description1: For over 15 years, Neema Gospel Choir has been a beacon of hope and joy in our community. Our name "Neema," meaning "grace" in Swahili, reflects our mission to share God's grace through the powerful medium of music.
home.description2: We are more than just a choir; we are a family united by faith, passion, and a shared commitment to spreading love and hope through gospel music. Our diverse group of talented singers comes together to create harmonies that touch hearts and transform lives.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.quote: Neema Gospel Choir brought such energy and spiritual depth to our wedding. Their performance was absolutely breathtaking!

testimonials.name: Pastor Michael
testimonials.quote: Having Neema perform at our church services has been a blessing. They truly understand worship and lead with their hearts.

testimonials.name: Maria Rodriguez
testimonials.quote: Their Christmas concert moved me to tears. The harmony, the passion, the joy - it was a truly transformative experience.
